query:
CREATE TABLE `phone_numbers` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`number` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
	`numberDisplay` varchar(32) DEFAULT '',
	`numberType` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'geographic',
	`provider` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`status` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
	`customerExternalId` varchar(32) DEFAULT '',
	`customerName` varchar(512) DEFAULT '',
	`serviceExternalId` varchar(32) DEFAULT '',
	`servicePlanName` varchar(512) DEFAULT '',
	`monthlyCost` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
	`monthlyRevenue` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
	`providerServiceCode` varchar(256) DEFAULT '',
	`notes` text,
	`dataSource` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'manual',
	`lastSyncedAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `phone_numbers_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
